name: ai-support-ticket-automation
description: Production-grade AI-powered customer support ticket automation system. Ingests support emails, classifies them with an LLM, routes to the right team, sends acknowledgments, and tracks the full ticket lifecycle with an audit trail.

scripts.test:integration:start: node server.js & sleep 3 && node scripts/integration-tests.js; kill %1 2>/dev/null

author: AI Engineer Candidate
